    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Applicant
    Applicant class with Identification attributes
    Application
    Application class, abstract and father class to three other visa classes
    DataLoader
    DataLoader class responsible for loading and saving data related to Applicants, Applications, and Officers from CSV files.
    DataManager
    DataManager interface defines the contract for loading and saving data related to Applicants, Applications, and Officers.
    Officer
     
    Status
    Enumeration representing the possible statuses of a visa application.
    StudentVisa
    Student Visa application class, sub class of application.
    Tester
    Tester class serves as the entry point of the Visa Office System.
    TouristVisa
    Tourist Visa application class, sub class of application.
    VisaOfficeSystem
    Core system class managing all visa processing operations.
    WorkVisa
    Work visa application class with employment information,and extends the applications class.
